pi_items.source: OpenBCI GUI source code (W_BandPower.pde) defines the 'Band Power' widget.
W_BandPower.pde specifies these 5 exact bands. Note: UI labels use ranges 0.5-4Hz, 4-8Hz, 8-13Hz, 13-32Hz, 32-100Hz, which slightly differ from the task description's text.

privileged_info_summary: The OpenBCI GUI version 5.2.2 runs in a Synthetic session. The application includes a 'Band Power' widget that displays five frequency bands: Delta, Theta, Alpha, Beta, and Gamma. Note that while the task description specifies certain frequency ranges (e.g., Alpha as 8-12 Hz, Beta as 12-30 Hz), the OpenBCI GUI actually labels them on the UI as Delta (0.5-4Hz), Theta (4-8Hz), Alpha (8-13Hz), Beta (13-32Hz), and Gamma (32-100Hz) as verified in its source code.
